example_nightbane_standard_modern.stackingRule: Strike bonuses from level tiers are cumulative. Do not stack with hand-to-hand strike bonuses.
example_nightbane_standard_modern.untrainedPenalties: May fire a loaded weapon without the W.P., but reloading takes twice as long and every shot is wild — no strike bonus whatsoever.
example_nightbane_standard_modern.systemConstraints: Modern W.P. strike bonuses do not stack with hand-to-hand strike bonuses.
example_nightbane_standard_modern.combatNotes: Aimed: one attack per shot. Burst: one strike roll for the whole burst. See Nightbane RPG Modern Weapon Proficiency Explanation for magazine-fraction burst tables.

revolver.stackingRule: Tier 1 aimed strike overrides bundle default for revolvers.
revolver.notes: Revolvers: +4 aimed at level 1 instead of +3.

example_nightbane_standard_modern.notes: Example bundle for usesStandardModernProgression W.P. rows.
